steps.title: Put the line in slope form
steps.content: To find slope, rewrite the equation in $y=mx+b$ form, where $m$ is the slope.

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content: The coefficient of $x$ in slope-intercept form is $2$, so the slope is $2$. The constant $\frac{12}{5}$ is only the $y$-intercept and does not affect the slope. That matches choice D.
